The system exhibits several issues, including ignoring other agents' suggestions (repeatedly prompting for a solution despite being told it's unsolvable), action-reasoning mismatches (proposing simplified implementations instead of addressing the core issue), task derailment (proposing irrelevant code), disobeying task specifications (incomplete code), premature termination (failing a task due to access token issues), and weak verification (failing to identify critical bugs). There are also instances of step repetition and loss of conversation history.
